mapper.select: SELECT id, pro_month_amount_fen, free_desc, free_features_text, pro_desc, pro_features_text, updated_at FROM payment_pricing_config WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_pricing_config (id, pro_month_amount_fen, free_desc, free_features_text, pro_desc, pro_features_text, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{proMonthAmountFen}, #{freeDesc}, #{freeFeaturesText}, #{proDesc}, #{proFeaturesText}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_pricing_config SET pro_month_amount_fen = #{proMonthAmountFen}, free_desc = #{freeDesc}, free_features_text = #{freeFeaturesText}, pro_desc = #{proDesc}, pro_features_text = #{proFeaturesText}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
